Appreciate the time yesterday. We’ve worked toward TDX for a long time, and before
pushing this into next year, I wanted to put our strongest possible offer in front of you,
please feel free to bring this internally.
I received final approval to reduce pricing to $79,000 with a 10x realized savings
guarantee. That means we will contractually commit to generating at least $790,000 in
hard savings within 12 months—or we refund 20% of the subscription (up to 30% if
needed). This fully de-risks the investment on your side.
• Guaranteed ROI: 10x TDX Cost ($790,000 minimum savings)
Additionally, many of our enterprise clients fund TDX entirely through their MSP
rebate/innovation funds (in your case, Guidant). If that’s an option, we can structure
invoicing in a way that requires little to no net new budget. Happy to get creative here.
If we can align on one of these two paths (direct budget or MSP funding), I’m confident
we can lock this in now and have measurable savings showing early in 2026.
